description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the cypress/base:latest Docker image and defines a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} with the paths .npm and cache/Cypress. Set the variables CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cache/Cypress and npm_config_cache to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.npm. Add a single stage named test and a job called test in that stage. In the test job run the commands: npm ci, $(npm bin)/print-env CI, npm run cy:verify, npm run start & and npm run e2e:record. Publish the cypress/videos and cypress/screenshots directories as artifacts that expire after 1 day.
